nasb.text: And amazement came upon them all, and they began talking with one another saying, “What is this message? For with authority and power He commands the unclean spirits and they come out.”

esv.text: And they were all amazed and said to one another, “What is this word? For with authority and power he commands the unclean spirits, and they come out!”

cnv.text: 眾人都驚駭，彼此談論說：“這是怎麼回事？他用權柄能力吩咐污靈，污靈竟出來了。”

ccb.text: 大家都很惊讶，彼此议论说：“这是怎么回事？祂的话竟然带着权柄和能力，一吩咐污鬼，它们就出来了！”

csbs.text: 大家都惊讶不已，彼此谈论说：“这是什么事呢？他带着权柄和能力命令那些污灵，它们就出来了！”
